milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data analyst to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
Data Analyst Certificates and Specializations on Coursera
Data Analyst Courses on Udemy
Data Analyst Programs and Courses on edX
FreeCodeCamp Data Analysis with Python Certification

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in sql, data visualisation (tableau, power bi), and excel and spreadsheet analysis — these are the essential building blocks for a data analyst

resources.title: Data Analytics Professional Certificates (Coursera)
SQL Tutorial (W3Schools)
Data Visualization with Tableau & Power BI Courses (Udemy)
Excel Data Analysis Tutorials (YouTube)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in python or r for analysis, statistical analysis, and data cleaning and preparation, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Python for Data Analysis, Statistics, and Data Cleaning Courses
Advanced Data Analysis and Statistical Methods Courses (Python/R)
Practical Data Cleaning and Preparation Techniques (Python/R) Tutorials
Pandas Official Documentation for Intermediate Data Wrangling and Analysis
GitHub Repositories for Applied Statistical Analysis and Data Cleaning Projects

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying sql, and data visualisation (tableau, power bi) in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Coursera Search for Data Analyst Project-Based Learning
Udemy Search for Real-World Data Analyst Projects
YouTube Search for End-to-End Data Analyst Project Tutorials (SQL, Tableau, Power BI)
edX Search for Data Analysis Programs with Project Focus
GitHub Topics for Data Analysis Projects and Real-World Datasets

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

resources.title: Coursera Search: Data Analyst Portfolio & Project Courses
Udemy Search: End-to-End Data Analysis Projects
YouTube Search: Data Analyst Project Walkthroughs
GitHub Search: Data Analyst Project Repositories (for inspiration)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data analyst skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Data Analyst Professional Certificates and Specializations (Coursera)
SQL Tutorial for Data Analysis (W3Schools)
Python for Data Analysis Specializations (Coursera)
Tableau and Power BI Data Visualization Tutorials (YouTube)
Excel and Statistical Analysis Courses for Data Analysts (Coursera)

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data analyst positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills
milestones.description:
(Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data analyst to build a strong learning foundation

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in sql, data visualisation (tableau, power bi), and excel and spreadsheet analysis — these are the essential building blocks for a data analyst

IBM Data Analyst Professional Certificate (Coursera Search)

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in python or r for analysis, statistical analysis, and data cleaning and preparation, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying sql, and data visualisation (tableau, power bi) in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
IBM Data Analyst Professional Certificate
freeCodeCamp Data Analysis with Python Certification

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Profile
milestones.description:
Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data analyst skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators
